Short CV

Research Assistant Meryem Kevser ZELKA was born in Ankara in 1993. She graduated from Metropolitan Hüseyin Yıldız Anatolian High School in 2011. She completed her undergraduate education at Istanbul (Fatih) University, Department of Genetics and Bioengineering in 2015. She completed her master's degree at Üsküdar University, Department of Molecular Biology in 2017 with the first degree. In 2018, she graduated from Anadolu University, Department of Health Institutions Management. She completed her second master's degree in Bioengineering at Üsküdar University in 2020. In the same year, she started her PhD program in Bioengineering at Yıldız Technical University and is still continuing. Since March 2020, she has been working as a Research Assistant at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, Department of Bioengineering.
